summary: Attempt 4 verifies secret-free runtime-neutral OAuth host contract scaffolding, but the authoritative whole-target verdict remains ADDITIONAL_WORK_NEEDED because those contracts are not persisted or consumed and the shared lease, host, routing, preflight, lifecycle, recovery, diagnostics, checkpoint, and boundary-test work remains incomplete.

testResults.notes: Schema smoke passed; Alembic has one head; diff hygiene passed.

scopeExclusions.item: Live OAuth-to-Omnigent end-to-end and restart/cancellation checks
scopeExclusions.reason: External credentials and services unavailable; non-blocking advisory evidence.

remainingWork.remainingWork: Wire direct, Omnigent, and OAuth maintenance through one retry-safe release-last Provider Profile lease.
Persist and consume bindings and host leases; implement Codex OAuth host materialization, exact-host preflight, automatic routing, and bridge authorization.
Implement generation drain, ordered cleanup, reconciliation, checkpoints, restore, and secret-safe Workflow Detail diagnostics.
Add contention, host lifecycle, routing, retry/restart, cleanup, and credential non-leakage tests and run Python tests with pytest available.

decision: Mandatory input for remediation attempt 5; continue only to the next remediation step.
